title: The Bloodbath
subtitle: As the tributes stand on their podiums, the horn sounds.

events.text: {name} grabs a shovel.
{name} grabs a backpack and retreats.
{name} snatches a bottle of alcohol and a rag.
{name} finds a bow, some arrows, and a quiver.
{name} runs away with a lighter and some rope.
{name} snatches a pair of sais.
{name} grabs a sword.
{name} takes a handful of throwing knives.
{name} runs away from the Cornucopia.
{name} grabs a jar of fishing bait while {name2} gets fishing gear.
{name} throws a knife into {name2}'s head.
{name} throws a knife into {name2}'s chest.
{name} stabs {name2} with a tree branch.
{name} stabs {name2} in the back with a trident.
{name} breaks {name2}'s nose for a basket of bread.
{name} and {name2} work together to drown {name3}.
{name}, {name2}, and {name3} work together to get as many supplies as possible.
{name}, {name2}, {name3}, and {name4} share everything they gathered before running.
{name} clutches a first aid kit and runs away.
{name} gathers as much food as they can.
{name} stays at the cornucopia for resources.
{name} and {name2} fight for a bag. {name} gives up and retreats.
{name} and {name2} fight for a bag. {name2} gives up and retreats.
{name} grabs a shield leaning on the cornucopia.
{name} takes a spear from inside the cornucopia.
{name} retrieves a trident from inside the cornucopia.
{name} rips a mace out of {name2}'s hands.
